hero.headline: Car Listings
hero.lead: Upload your photos and let {{partner}}'s AI build your listing in seconds. Powered by {{product}}.

upload.dropOrClick: Drop photos here or click to upload
upload.formats: JPG, PNG, or WebP · up to {{max}} images
upload.sameCarHint: All photos should be the same car from different angles (best accuracy). You always get one listing — if a photo differs, we still pick one primary vehicle and merge details.
upload.cameraDenied: Camera permission denied. Allow camera access or upload a photo instead.
upload.cameraNotFound: No suitable camera found. Please upload a photo instead.
upload.cameraFailed: Could not start the camera. Upload a photo instead.
upload.fitCar: Fit the whole car in the frame

processing.queuedHint: Your Photo Will Start Analyzing In A Moment.

listing.vertexBusy: Requests Exceeded — wait 1 min and re-upload
listing.featuresHint: Uncheck features you do not wish to display.
listing.featuresUnavailable: Safety and comfort feature detection was unavailable for this scan.
listing.publishRequiredIntro: Please complete the following required fields to publish:
listing.publishYearInvalid: Year must be a valid 4-digit number (e.g. 2020)
listing.accountConnected: Account connected. Publish will use the saved session.
listing.savedSessionFound: Saved API token found. Publish will use it automatically unless it expires.
listing.enterCredentials: Enter your Car Butler credentials to connect your account
listing.alreadyPostedFacebook: This ad has already been posted to Facebook.
listing.alreadyPostedInstagram: This ad has already been posted to Instagram.
listing.saveRequiredIntro: Please correct the following errors to save changes:
listing.priceInvalid: Asking Price must be a valid positive number
listing.mileageInvalid: Mileage must be a valid non-negative number

unclear_image.title: Image Too Unclear
unclear_image.tip: Try a clearer, well-lit photo of the car from the front, side, or rear.

partial_car.title: Car Not Fully in Frame
partial_car.tip: Show more of the vehicle—avoid tight crops or half-visible cars. Include the full car or a clear front, side, or rear view.

multiple_cars.title: Multiple Cars Detected
multiple_cars.tip: Please upload a photo where one car is clearly the main subject.

unsupported_format.title: Unsupported Format
unsupported_format.tip: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.

no_match.title: No Reliable Match Found
no_match.tip: The car could not be identified. Try a higher-resolution image or a different angle.

not_a_car.title: Not a Car Image
not_a_car.tip: Please upload a photo of a car.

API_KEY_MISSING.title: Service Not Configured
API_KEY_MISSING.tip: The app is not set up correctly. Please contact support.

GEMINI_ACCESS_DENIED.title: Access Blocked
GEMINI_ACCESS_DENIED.tip: The AI service could not be reached. Please contact support.

PARSE_ERROR.title: Scan Failed
PARSE_ERROR.tip: Something went wrong while analyzing the photo. Please try again.

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.title: Service Temporarily Busy
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.tip: Our AI service is under high load right now. Please wait a moment and try again.

RATE_LIMIT.title: Too Many Requests
RATE_LIMIT.tip: You've sent too many scans in a short time. Please wait a few seconds and try again.

default.title: Something Went Wrong
default.tip: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

installPrompt.title: Install {{product}}
installPrompt.description: Add to your home screen for quick access and an app-like experience.

login.invalidCredentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
login.serverError: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.

pwa.installCardHint: Install for a faster, app-like experience
